data.title: Match Group Faces Investor Scrutiny Over Tinder Woes, Hinge Expansion Plans
data.description: Match Group faces high expectations for its investor meeting as Wall Street awaits its turnaround plan for Tinder, which has been struggling since 2023.

data.title: Dental Product Supplier Patterson Companies Goes Private In $4.1 Billion Deal
data.description: Patient Square Capital to acquire Patterson Companies for $4.1B. The deal is set to close in fiscal Q4 2025, taking the company private.

data.title: Why Netflix Stock Is Rising
data.description: Netflix shares are trading higher by 2% during Wednesday's session. JPMorgan analyst Doug Anmuth raised his price target on the streaming giant from $850 to $1,010.

data.title: Elon Musk's Crazy New Job Pays Up To $7,500 A Month – But You'll Be Walking In VR for 8 Hours A Day
